data.name: Testing.RedListNotEnough
data.value: At least 20 active Red List questions are required

data.name: Testing.NotEnoughQuestions
data.value: There are not enough active questions for this test

data.name: Testing.AttemptAlreadySubmitted
data.value: This test attempt has already been submitted

data.name: Testing.AttemptRewardCalculationFailed
data.value: XP calculation failed; the attempt was not changed

data.name: Testing.AttemptRewardConflict
data.value: The XP reward for this attempt has already been recorded

data.name: Testing.InvalidMode
data.value: The selected test mode is invalid

data.name: Testing.InvalidQuestionCount
data.value: The selected question count is invalid

data.name: Testing.MmtProfileRequired
data.value: Create an active MMT profile before starting this test

data.name: Testing.MmtChoicesRequired
data.value: Save all 12 admission choices before starting the monthly exam

data.name: Testing.MonthlyExamClosed
data.value: The monthly exam is not available now

data.name: Testing.MonthlyExamAlreadyStarted
data.value: You have already started the monthly exam in this window

data.name: Testing.RedListItemNotFound
data.value: The Red List item was not found
